overview: GPT-5.5-Cyber is a large language model from OpenAI, part of the GPT Cyber line. Released 2026-05-07. Specialized, more permissive cybersecurity model for vetted defenders under OpenAI's Trusted Access for Cyber.
What's notable in this version: Limited preview; tuned to be more permissive on security tasks (red teaming, pentest, malware study).
